turns.name: WARREN E. BURGER
turns.text: I have the disposition to announce in Vance against the Universal Amusement Company and for reasons stated in a per curiam opinion of the Court filed this morning, the judgement of the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit is affirmed. Mr. Justice Powell joins me in a dissenting opinion and Mr. Justice White is joined by Mr. Justice Rehnquist also in a dissenting opinion.
